base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mountain_bg_loop_overworld — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1985 super mario bros. 48-tile-wide (3-screen) parallax background loop — distant hills + low clouds over blue sky. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 48-tile-wide (3-screen) parallax background loop — distant hills + low clouds over blue sky; repeats seamlessly as Mario walks right. Static per-frame; scrolling is camera-relative at slower rate than foreground
